2603.17912.title: Pretrained Multilingual Transformers Reveal Quantitative Distance Between Human Languages
2603.17912.paper_summary: Understanding the distance between human languages is central to linguistics, anthropology, and tracing human evolutionary history. Yet, while linguistics has long provided rich qualitative accounts of cross-linguistic variation, a unified and scalable quantitative approach to measuring language distance remains lacking. In this paper, we introduce a method that leverages pretrained multilingual language models as systematic instruments for linguistic measurement. Specifically, we show that the spontaneously emerged attention mechanisms of these models provide a robust, tokenization-agnostic measure of cross-linguistic distance, termed Attention Transport Distance (ATD). By treating attention matrices as probability distributions and measuring their geometric divergence via optimal transport, we quantify the representational distance between languages during translation. Applying ATD to a large and diverse set of languages, we demonstrate that the resulting distances recover established linguistic groupings with high fidelity and reveal patterns aligned with geographic and contact-induced relationships. Furthermore, incorporating ATD as a regularizer improves transfer performance in low-resource machine translation. Our results establish a principled foundation for testing linguistic hypotheses using artificial neural networks. This framework transforms multilingual models into powerful tools for quantitative linguistic discovery, facilitating more equitable multilingual AI.
2603.17912.paper_summary_zh: 理解人類語言之間的距離對於語言學、人類學以及追溯人類進化歷史至關重要。<lb/>然而，儘管語言學長期以來提供了豐富的跨語言變異的定性描述，但仍缺乏一種統一且可擴展的量化方法來測量語言距離。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了一種利用預訓練的多語言模型作為語言測量系統工具的方法。<lb/>具體而言，我們展示了這些模型自發出現的注意力機制提供了一種穩健的、與標記無關的跨語言距離測量，稱為注意力傳輸距離（Attention Transport Distance，ATD）。<lb/>通過將注意力矩陣視為概率分佈並通過最優傳輸測量其幾何發散，我們量化了翻譯過程中語言之間的表徵距離。<lb/>將ATD應用於一個大型且多樣的語言集，我們展示了所得到的距離以高保真度恢復了既定的語言分組，並揭示了與地理和接觸引起的關係一致的模式。<lb/>此外，將ATD作為正則化器納入可以改善低資源機器翻譯的轉移性能。<lb/>我們的結果為使用人工神經網絡測試語言假設建立了原則性的基礎。<lb/>這一框架將多語言模型轉變為強大的量化語言發現工具，促進了更公平的多語言人工智慧。
2603.17912.author: Yue Zhao et.al.
2603.17912.authors: Yue Zhao, Jiatao Gu, Paloma Jeretič, Weijie Su
